priorityInstruction: Participial density is 5.5% against a 12.0% target and the texture score is 17.2 against a 27.0 target — add ', Ving' connective tissue in the flagged cellar and trader zones before worrying about any other metric.

changes.before: She went down with bow in hand and an arrow nocked. Cellars in dead villages did not earn the benefit of doubt.
changes.after: She went down with bow in hand and an arrow nocked, because cellars in dead villages did not earn the benefit of doubt.
changes.rationale: Joined action to judgment so the cellar entry reads as one tactical motion instead of two clipped beats.

changes.before: Neral came down with her bow slung and her hands empty. She crouched at the foot of the steps and waited until the girl's breathing came down from a raw rasp before she spoke.
changes.after: Neral came down with her bow slung and her hands empty, crouching at the foot of the steps and waiting until the girl's breathing came down from a raw rasp before she spoke.
changes.rationale: Added connective tissue in the cellar handling beat without changing the order of action.

changes.before: Sweetness first. That was what Miri remembered earliest—a sweetness on people's breath that turned up in the bread and the water and the morning porridge.
changes.after: Sweetness came first—the thing Miri remembered earliest, turning up on people's breath and in the bread and the water and the morning porridge.
changes.rationale: Smoothed the witness-summary opening while keeping Miri's broken recollection intact.

changes.before: No one in the room moved.
changes.after: No one in the room moved when she said it.
changes.rationale: Embedded the reaction inside the testimony so the emotional read lands in motion rather than as an isolated stub.

changes.before:
"North," Sylvanas said.

"The north road." Miri swallowed water and coughed, then clutched the skin back to her chest. "Not to the river. Not to the fields. North."
changes.after: "North," Sylvanas said, and Miri swallowed water, coughing before she clutched the skin back to her chest. "The north road. Not to the river. Not to the fields. North."
changes.rationale: Kept Sylvanas clipped while joining the confirmation to Miri's physical reaction.

changes.before: That much rang true. A local grain man would know the baker by name, remember who haggled, know which settlements bought seed and which bought bread flour because they had already run through their own.
changes.after: That much rang true; a local grain man would know the baker by name, remember who haggled, know which settlements bought seed and which bought bread flour because they had already run through their own.
changes.rationale: Bound two closely related tactical judgments into one line, as requested by the auditor.

changes.before: "Plague," Sylvanas said. She let the word stand between them. "You trade grain on this road?"
changes.after: "Plague," Sylvanas said, letting the word stand between them before she asked, "You trade grain on this road?"
changes.rationale: Blended the trader's surprise beat into the question instead of clicking from fragment to fragment.

changes.before:
She watched the wagon long enough for a second look and no more, then turned south.

The horses were saddled and waiting.
changes.after: She watched the wagon long enough for a second look and no more, then turned south, where the horses were saddled and waiting.
changes.rationale: Replaced an isolated exit sentence with a joined clause so the southbound recommitment flows into the final road picture.

selfAudit.voice: Edits stay in Sylvanas's clipped tactical register; no added line shifts into explanatory narration or out-of-character ornament.
selfAudit.physicalLogic: Every added participial phrase describes simultaneous or immediately linked action; no impossible overlapping motion was introduced.
selfAudit.antiSlop: Changed passages were checked against the hitlist and editor guide; no therapy-speak, creative dialogue tags, or hedge-heavy replacement patterns were introduced.
selfAudit.rhythmCheck: Post-edit rhythm scorer on v4-r1.md returned texture_score 20.4, participial_pct 6.8, compound_pct 9.4, and semicolon_pct 0.8.
